steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text says elements of the Spanish-mission style "have been reproduced throughout the state." The blank describes how Santa Clara University relates to the mission style — i.e., copying or modeling it.

steps.title: Match the precise word
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean copy or model after — "reproduced throughout the state" is the key signal. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — renovate: means to restore or modernize an existing structure — Santa Clara University did not restore the old missions; it built new structures in that style. ✗
  • Choice B — imitate: means to copy or model after — exactly matches "reproduced"; the university's design copies the Spanish-mission style. ✓
  • Choice C — neglect: means to ignore or fail to care for — the opposite of what the passage says; the university actively adopted the style. ✗
  • Choice D — reject: means to refuse or turn away — contradicts the passage entirely; the university embraced, not rejected, the mission style. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
